plan_review_notes: Approved the invalidation-rule slice. The scope is narrow and correctly sequenced after envelope recording: define the change/action matrix now, and leave event publication and orchestration for later tasks.

plan_review_history.notes: Revised the generic scaffold into a rule-only invalidation slice: classify explicit evolution change classes across follow-up requests, execution receipts, verification artifacts, review-gate changes, and envelopes, then map them to deduped remediation actions such as recreate follow-up request, reproject receipts, reproject verification, rerun promotion gate, and rerecord envelopes.

Approved the invalidation-rule slice. The scope is narrow and correctly sequenced after envelope recording: define the change/action matrix now, and leave event publication and orchestration for later tasks.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to invalidation rule definitions and evaluator helpers only. The implementation may add change-class and remediation-action vocabularies plus an evaluator over evolution artifact refs. It must not add event-bus publication, CLI/MCP surfaces, or orchestration loops.

normal_cases.name: A follow-up request change marks the follow-up artifact stale and recommends follow-up recreation plus promotion-gate rerun.
An execution-receipt change recommends receipt reprojection, verification reprojection, promotion-gate rerun, and envelope rerecording.

edge_cases.name: Combined verification and envelope changes dedupe overlapping remediation actions while preserving stable action order.
The invalidation outcome preserves run and candidate identity together with the stale artifact refs.

exception_cases.name: Unsupported change classes fail with an actionable error instead of defaulting to a generic remediation path.
Empty change sets fail clearly instead of fabricating a stale outcome with no cause.
